_comment: Dedicated profile for the darkmux self-review CI workflow (.github/workflows/darkmux-review.yml). Pinned via DARKMUX_PROFILES so the review dispatch always uses this model regardless of the runner's active profile. Model is qwen3-8b because it emits its answer in the message CONTENT, so the dispatch gets a usable final_assistant. The qwen3_5-family models (e.g. qwen3.6-35b-a3b) route their output to reasoning_content and leave content empty under the current LMStudio reasoning-parser config, which yields empty reviews — revisit once that LMStudio config is sorted. The model must be available in the runner's LMStudio (see .github/DARKMUX_REVIEW_RUNNER.md).

darkmux-review.description: darkmux self-review CI — qwen3-8b on the laptop runner
